home.title: Kwa Miganda
home.subtitle: Where Burundian Heritage Meets Nature
home.description: A cultural eco-retreat in the hills of Mwaro where visitors discover ancestral traditions, nature, and authentic hospitality.
home.storyTitle: Where the wisdom of ancestral Burundi meets the serenity of nature.
home.storyDescription1: Visitors are welcomed into a traditional Rugo — the ancestral homestead — where they discover rituals, music, crafts, and medicinal plants passed down through generations.
home.storyDescription2: Kwa Miganda is both a cultural preservation project and a peaceful retreat, nestled in the green hills of Mwaro province.

heritageVisit.title: Heritage Visit
heritageVisit.description: Explore the traditional Rugo homestead and discover ancestral Burundian architecture and daily life.

culturalExperience.title: Cultural Experience
culturalExperience.description: Immerse yourself in traditional music, drumming, poetry, and storytelling ceremonies.

natureWalks.title: Nature Walks
natureWalks.description: Walk through the rolling green hills of Mwaro, guided by local experts.

botanicalGarden.title: Botanical Garden
botanicalGarden.description: Discover indigenous medicinal plants and learn about traditional healing practices.

home.findUsDescription: Kwa Miganda is located in Mwaro Province, in the heart of Burundi's lush highlands — easily accessible from both major cities.

cta.label: PLAN YOUR JOURNEY
cta.title: Plan Your Visit to Kwa Miganda
cta.description: Begin your journey into Burundi's heritage and nature.

heritage.label: CULTURAL HERITAGE
heritage.title: A Living Testament to Burundian Tradition
heritage.description: Kwa Miganda is more than a destination — it is a preservation of identity, where every hut, plant, and song tells a story of resilience and beauty.

architecture.title: Traditional Architecture
architecture.description: The Rugo compound preserves ancestral building techniques using earth, wood, and thatch — a living museum of Burundian domestic life.

plants.title: Medicinal Plants
plants.description: Our botanical garden holds dozens of indigenous species used for centuries in traditional healing, documented and maintained by local elders.

music.title: Music & Poetry
music.description: Experience the rhythmic power of Burundian drumming and the oral poetry tradition that carries stories across generations.

community.title: Community
community.description: Kwa Miganda directly supports local families, ensuring that cultural knowledge is preserved and shared with the world.

safari.title: Nature Safari
safari.description: Explore local wildlife with our expert guides

lodge.title: Our Lodge
lodge.description: Discover our comfortable and authentic lodge, nestled in the heart of nature.

history.title: History
history.description: Discover the rich and fascinating history of our region.

culture.title: Culture
culture.description: Dive into local traditions and culture preserved for generations.

conservation.title: Conservation
conservation.description: Our commitment to preserving the environment and cultural heritage.

location.title: Our Location
location.byCar: By car: 2 hours from the main city

booking.title: Book Now
booking.successMessage: Thank you for your booking! We will contact you soon.

footer.description: A cultural heritage eco-retreat in the hills of Mwaro, Burundi. Where ancestral tradition meets the serenity of nature.
